mapper.select: SELECT p.* FROM sys_permission p LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} AND p.deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.* FROM sys_permission p LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON rp.role_id = u.role_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND u.deleted = 0
